For loan or withdrawal access, confirm whether the plan allows the requested feature and whether the participant is eligible.
warnings: Do not treat contribution eligibility as required for account setup because the article says setup can happen even if the participant is not yet eligible to contribute.
Do not guarantee loan or withdrawal availability because plan allowance and participant eligibility are required.
Do not guarantee beneficiary access before the first contribution has been deposited.
Do not disclose the email address on file if the participant's provided email does not match.

Do not immediately guide the participant through new account creation if MFA status already shows enrolled; first guide them toward logging in or redirect them to support if they cannot use the existing MFA code.
questions_to_ask: Have you received your initial enrollment notice, or are you asking because you have not received it yet?
Are you asking about account setup, beneficiary access, or Loans & Distributions?
Are you trying to create a new account, or are you having trouble logging in to an account you already created?
what_not_to_say: Do not say a participant must be eligible to contribute before creating the online account.
Do not say a participant can use Loans & Distributions without plan allowance and eligibility.
Do not say the participant can access Beneficiaries before the first contribution has been deposited.
Do not say the participant can create a second new account if MFA status already shows enrolled; guide them toward logging in or support if they cannot use the existing MFA code.
Do not say or disclose what email address is on file when the participant's provided email does not match.
Do not guarantee that every dashboard feature listed in the article will be available.

participant_message_components: Some dashboard features may vary by plan.
Loans and withdrawals are available only if your plan allows them and you are eligible.
If available, Loans & Distributions can be found in the top right corner of your dashboard.

The dashboard may include features such as account balance, savings rate, portfolio snapshot, transaction history, links to change rates, My Portfolio, Loans & Distributions, Statements, Beneficiary Information, FAQ, and Settings, but not every feature is guaranteed to appear for every participant.
If loans are available to you, the maximum amount available to borrow will be displayed in the loan flow.
If withdrawals are available to you, you may select from the eligible withdrawal or termination distribution reasons shown.
next_steps: Check whether the participant's plan allows the requested loan or withdrawal feature.
Check whether the participant is eligible for the requested loan or withdrawal feature.
If the participant is eligible and the plan allows it, direct the participant to Loans & Distributions from the top right corner of the dashboard.
If the participant is asking about loans, explain only that the maximum amount available to borrow will be displayed if loans are available to them.
If the participant is asking about withdrawals, explain only that they may select from the eligible withdrawal or termination distribution reasons shown if withdrawals are available to them.
If the participant is asking about another missing dashboard feature, explain that dashboard features may vary and do not guarantee availability.
warnings: The article uses plan-variation language for loans and withdrawals.
The dashboard may include listed features, so do not guarantee universal availability.

Do not provide loan limits, loan eligibility rules, withdrawal eligibility rules, tax guidance, penalty guidance, or processing timelines unless they are explicitly shown to the participant or stated in the article.
Do not treat Loans & Distributions as available unless both plan allowance and participant eligibility are confirmed.
questions_to_ask: Are you trying to access a loan, a withdrawal, or another dashboard feature?
Are you able to see Loans & Distributions in the top right corner of your dashboard?
If you are asking about a withdrawal, which eligible withdrawal or termination distribution reasons are shown to you?
If you are asking about a loan, are you able to see the maximum amount available to borrow in the loan flow?
what_not_to_say: Do not guarantee the plan allows loans or withdrawals.
Do not guarantee the participant is eligible for loans or withdrawals.
Do not guarantee every participant will see the same dashboard features.
Do not give a specific loan amount unless it is displayed to the participant in the loan flow.
Do not list withdrawal reasons unless they are shown to the participant in Loans & Distributions.
Do not provide loan or withdrawal processing timelines because the article does not state them.
Do not provide tax or penalty guidance because the article does not include tax or penalty information.
Do not say the participant can access Loans & Distributions if plan allowance or participant eligibility is unknown.
